description: Extract function name and parameter values from user query text using deterministic parsing and LLM

inputs.name: user_query_text
inputs.description: The complete user query containing the function request and parameter values to extract

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string containing available function definitions with their parameter schemas and requirements

output.description: Returns a function call object with the function name as the top-level key and its parameters as a nested object. For example: {"calculate_triangle_area": {"base": 10, "height": 5, "unit": "units"}}. The structure contains the function name as the outer key and all extracted parameter values with their proper data types (integers, strings, etc.) as specified in the function schema.

fields.function_name: dict - The function call with extracted parameter values

workflow_spec.name: Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parse user queries to extract function parameters and generate properly formatted function calls with extracted values
